seoTitle: How to Switch From Wix Studio to Wix Classic Editor
metaDescription: Learn how to route a new site into the Wix Classic Editor instead of Wix Studio when creating a project in your account.
intro: If you're used to Wix's traditional drag-and-drop workflow, you may prefer the Classic Editor over the newer Studio environment. This guide covers navigating your account preferences and the site creation flow so a new project routes into the Classic Editor rather than defaulting to Studio.

steps.heading: Open your Wix Studio dashboard
steps.body: Access your central account and profile preferences from the Studio workspace.

steps.heading: Check workspace preferences
steps.body: Review default site generation environment settings to see how new projects are routed.

steps.heading: Go to your Sites directory
steps.body: Navigate to your main Sites panel and click Create New Site.

steps.heading: Bypass the Studio setup screens
steps.body: Select the option to route your new project to the Classic Editor pathway instead of Studio.

steps.heading: Choose a template or blank canvas
steps.body: Browse Classic Editor templates or start from a blank canvas once you're routed there.

steps.heading: Verify the interface
steps.body: Confirm the standard grid interface and toolbar appear correctly, checking both desktop and mobile views before building.

faq.question: Can I switch an existing Studio site to Classic Editor?
faq.answer: This process is about routing a new site creation into Classic Editor rather than converting an existing Studio site, since the two use different underlying systems.

faq.question: Why would I prefer Classic Editor over Studio?
faq.answer: Some users prefer Classic Editor's more straightforward drag-and-drop workflow over Studio's more advanced, design-agency-oriented environment.

faq.question: Can I manage sites in both editors from the same account?
faq.answer: Yes, your account can hold multiple site assets built in different editor versions simultaneously.

faq.question: Will my account default to Studio for future sites?
faq.answer: Depending on your workspace preferences, new sites may default to Studio unless you specifically choose the Classic pathway each time.
